programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Nestled in the hills of Ohio just west of the Appalachians is a very special deer camp ripe with memories from deer season’s past. With the development of the 350 Legend straight-walled cartridge by Winchester in 2019, a world of opportunities now existed in states like Ohio and Michigan. In this episode, with the 350 Legend in hand, three mature whitetails meet their maker, from the same blind, over the course of three seasons.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc:
It’s been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world’s best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell.
GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: For the first time in history, the World English Sporting Clays Championship was held in the United States at the incredible M&M Hunting Preserve owned by the Matarese family in New Jersey. Watch as Winchester’s best shooters vie for Gold as they compete against over 2,500 shooters and 17 countries. We’ll also join the Kids and Clays foundation in Florida as they host an event that will most certainly touch your soul.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Across the country, deer season to many Americans is a rite of passage. In this episode, we’ll celebrate the many successes by Team Winchester hunters in the field during whitetail and mule deer firearm seasons across the United States. GUESTS: Melissa Bachman (Team Winchester) Mark Drury (Team Winchester) Nikki Boxler (Team Winchester) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester) Jason Gilbertson (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Aftermath hosts Chris and Cindy sit down with contestants Caleb and Jen to discuss one of the hardest days in Surviving Mann history. programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Matthew and James for a recap of Day 3, and let’s just say they’ll be staying away from crunches for the foreseeable future. Matthew also lets us in on his weakness that he’s hoping to work through in the upcoming days. From there, James goes into his background and the challenges he’s overcome to be able to rise up and test his limits.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Day 4 of Season 3 kicks off with some much anticipated shooting.. or does it? This course of fire is actually using the latest cutting-edge CO2 technologies to train the contestants with another option for nonlethal force. Having a new weaponry option tucked in their arsenal, the competitors set out on their first recon mission for their CIA mission. Trudging through Alligator infested waters to their rendezvous point, the weight of the successful mission hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Contestants Stephen and Zacharias sit down to go through their experience with shooting the latest nonlethal weaponry and how their mission prep is going so far. From there, host Chris Heavens invites U.S. Arms and Athlon Optics to take a seat and show a sneak peak at their latest products. Before the end of the episode, the contestants let it slip that there’s going to be quite the surprise to come.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers 1952
programme.desc: In The Bushwhackers, John Ireland stars as a war-weary Confederate soldier who drifts west seeking peace, only to find violence waiting on the frontier. When ruthless land barons use guns and terror to drive settlers from their homes, he’s forced to take up arms once more. With Lon Chaney Jr. and Lawrence Tierney adding menace and intrigue, this tense Western delivers a hard-hitting tale of greed, justice, and a reluctant hero who can’t outrun the fight for what’s right.

programme.title: Apocalypse Joe 1970
programme.desc: In Apocalypse Joe, Anthony Steffen stars as a wandering gunslinger who inherits land in a lawless frontier town. When ruthless killers move in to claim it for themselves, Joe answers with blazing six-guns, deadly precision, and a flair for theatrical showdowns. Bursting with Spaghetti Western style—complete with brutal action, sweeping vistas, and a haunting score—this cult favorite turns vengeance into a deadly performance on the stage of the Wild West.
